title: rubus carnkiefensis
intro: Rubus carnkiefensis, also known as the Carnkie raspberry, is a species of shrub or low-growing perennial plant in the rose family. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Rubus carnkiefensis include its potential to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, as well as its antioxidant properties which may help to protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
